title: Reactome connector (ContentService) — a pathway entity as SQL
description: A Reactome pathway/entity as DATA: a GET to reactome.org/ContentService parsed into a table by ducknng_ncurl_table; the stable id is the binding {reactome_id}.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (a ducknng_ncurl_table GET).
